thought.text:
Score variance 56-60 across runs. That's expected from timing noise on shared environment.

Let me try one more easy win: convert `sdiv x, 2^n` for power-of-2 to shift+add. Actually the simplest case is `sdiv x, 2`:

```
%t = lshr i32 %x, 31
%t2 = add i32 %x, %t  
%result = ashr i32 %t2, 1
```

This replaces `sdiv` (~20-40 cycles) with 3 fast ops. 

Let me add this transformation:

tool_call.name: file_editor
